name: Bavarian Apple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the sugar, butter or margarine, solid shortening, and vanilla on medium speed of an electric mixer until combined.
2. Blend in flour and salt until crumbly. Pat mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Set aside. Place apple slices in a single layer in a shallow baking pan. Cover with foil.
4. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until fluffy.
6. Add the eggs, all at once, beating on low speed just until combined.
7. Pour into dough-lined pan.
8. Arrange warm apple slices on top of the filling.
9. Combine the remaining sugar and cinnamon.
10. Sprinkle with almonds on top of the warm apples.
11. Bake at 400°F for 40 minutes or until golden.
12. Cool. Remove sides and place cake on a serving platter.
13. Cover; chill 4-24 hours before serving.
